gh_88e840bc038baa99e0771b24.title: Add TryRepurpose — AI content tool for remote workers and distributed team members
gh_88e840bc038baa99e0771b24.description:
## Resource Submission: TryRepurpose

Hi! Proposing **[TryRepurpose](https://tryrepurpose.com)** for the Awesome Remote Job list.

**What it is:** TryRepurpose is an AI-powered content repurposing platform that helps remote workers, distributed team members, and remote-first founders grow their personal brand and attract opportunities by turning their existing content into multi-platform posts automatically.

**Why it matters for remote workers:**
Personal branding is especially important for remote professionals — it is how you get noticed, get hired, and get clients without a physical office or in-person network. TryRepurpose makes it easy to:
- Turn LinkedIn posts into Twitter threads and newsletters
- Repurpose remote work tips into short-form video scripts
- Convert webinar presentations into blog posts and social content
- Build thought leadership in remote work communities consistently

**Links:**
- Website: https://tryrepurpose.com
- Remote workers page: https://tryrepurpose.com/content-repurposing-for-remote-workers

Thanks for this valuable resource!
